description_long: This is a large, multi-story residential house surrounded by a white fence and lush landscaping, including several mature trees and flowering bushes. The building features a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. Multiple arched windows are symmetrically arranged on each facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. A prominent glass conservatory or sunroom extends from one side of the house, adding a contemporary touch and connecting the indoor and outdoor spaces. The main entrance is marked by a small set of steps, a wooden door, and a modest porch area. The property includes a well-maintained lawn and garden areas, enhancing its suburban appeal.
description: A large, modern multi-story house with a flat roof, arched windows, a glass conservatory, and lush landscaping enclosed by a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, glass conservatory, and vibrant landscaping with flowering bushes and trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass conservatory, tall trees, and the symmetrical arrangement of arched windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back garden, additional trees, and the full length of the glass conservatory.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the upper stories, window arrangement, and the continuation of the white fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with wooden door, small steps, modest porch, and minimal decorative elements
